Fact: In the Pokémon Red and Blue beta, Tentacruel was originally known as "Manowar", after the Portuguese man o' war.
Tentacruel, Toedscruel, and their respective evolutionary lines have exactly the same base stats in the same distribution.

Tentacruel's Water-type is strong against Toedscruel's Ground-type, but weak to its Grass-type. Similarly, Tentacruel's Poison-type is strong against Toedscruel's Grass-type, but weak to its Ground-type.
Even though many of Tentacruel's Pokédex entries mention it having 80 tentacles, it is never shown to have that many, with its main artwork only showing up to 14 tentacles.
